title: Pungent Garlicky Canadian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful lacto-vegetarian stew featuring red chilli and garlic, cooked in a molcajete vessel and finished with a mushimono-steam technique.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a molcajete vessel over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the diced red chilli and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the peeled and chopped carrots and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the rinsed and drained red lentils, vegetable broth, and dried thyme, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in the plain lacto-vegetarian yogurt and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Finish the stew with a mushimono-steam technique by covering the molcajete vessel with a lid and steaming for 5 minutes.
